engineer.description: 💬 Agent: Ask technical questions, debug issues, discuss architecture

designer.description: 💬 Agent: Ask UX questions, get design guidance, accessibility advice

pm.description: 💬 Agent: Product strategy, prioritization, problem framing, scope management

engineer-review.description: 📄 File Review: Technical feasibility and architecture analysis

designer-review.description: 📄 File Review: UX, accessibility, and design pattern analysis

collab.description: 🤝 Multi-Agent: Get engineer + designer + PM perspectives, synthesized

init-project.description: 🔧 Utility: Initialize a new project from this template

designer-brand-identity.description: 🎨 Designer Skill: Apply brand tokens, styling, and voice/tone guidelines

pm-generate-prd.description: 📝 PM Skill: Convert rough MVP ideas into structured PRDs

pm-clarify-prd.description: 📝 PM Skill: Clarify PRDs through structured questioning

designer-prd-to-ux.description: 🎨 Designer Skill: Translate PRDs into UX specifications (6-pass framework)

ux-to-implementation-plan.description: 🔧 Utility: Generate implementation plan with small, context-efficient chunks from UX specs

executive.description: 💼 Agent: Strategic reviews, business cases, prioritization, stakeholder alignment

user-researcher.description: 🔍 Agent: User validation, research planning, Jobs-to-be-Done, insight synthesis
